description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Social Site Generator (SSG) 2.0 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) sgc_id parameter to display_blog.php, (2) scm_mem_id parameter to social_my_profile_download.php, and the (3) catid parameter to social_forum_subcategories.php.
